# Buy Online Pick Up In Store

At Acme Shop, customers can conveniently place orders for in-store pickup by selecting the "Buy Online Pick Up In Store" option during checkout. After choosing a store location based on ZIP code, shoppers receive an email confirmation with order details and an estimated pickup time, typically within 2 hours for in-stock items. Certain items may be ineligible for pickup and will be indicated on the product page. Customers must present the confirmation email and a valid ID when picking up their orders, which should be collected within 7 days to avoid cancellation.

[Source: store_pickup.md#buy-online-pick-up-in-store]
